headline: Ford Buyback And BlueCruise Review Shape View On Undervalued Shares
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) has announced an anti dilutive share repurchase program intended to offset dilution from equity compensation and convertible notes. The company also faces an upcoming NTSB hearing focused on fatal accidents involving its BlueCruise driver assistance system. These developments come as the stock trades around $11.67, with mixed recent share price performance. For investors following NYSE:F, these two storylines sit alongside a share price of $11.67 and a mixed return...

headline: Is Rivian Automotive, Inc. (RIVN) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is RIVN a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Rivian Automotive, Inc. on VJS Newsletter’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on RIVN. Rivian Automotive, Inc.’s share was trading at $16.54 as of March 10th. Rivian Automotive, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells category-defining electric vehicles.
